title: 2 Pack x 200ml Special Occasions Temporary Gold Colour Hair Spray Wash Out Party Fancy Dress Up, with Finger Protector
features: Instant Color in One Spray Get bold, vibrant color in seconds with a quick, hassle-free application.
Ideal for Every Celebration Perfect for themed parties, festivals, fancy dress, and special occasions.
Washes Out Easily No long-term commitment—simply rinse out with shampoo when you're done.
Safe & Gentle on All Hair Types Designed to work safely on all hair textures—fine, thick, curly, or straight.
Rich Gold Finish Each spray delivers a vibrant, eye-catching gold tone for a glamorous, attention-grabbing look.
description: Product description Shine Bright with Gold Temporary Hair Colour Spray – 2 Pack (200ml Each) Turn heads and add a touch of glamour instantly with this vibrant Gold Temporary Hair Colour Spray, now available in a convenient 2 Pack of 200ml cans. Whether you're getting ready for a costume party, themed event, festival, or any special occasion, this golden spray delivers bold color and show-stopping style in seconds — with zero long-term commitment. Designed for ease and performance, the fast-drying formula provides rich, eye-catching gold tones that last throughout your event and wash out effortlessly with shampoo. It’s gentle on all hair types and leaves no residue behind. Perfect for adding shimmering highlights, dramatic streaks, or full coverage, this lightweight spray layers easily without weighing hair down. The included finger-protection coat ensures a cleaner, more comfortable application every time. For those moments when you want to sparkle and shine, this gold hair spray is your go-to solution for instant, washable color that makes a lasting impression — just not a permanent one. Directions Spray onto hair for instant color, washes out with shampoo. Safety Warning Eye Irritant See more
